title: Manikandeswaram Uma Maheswara temple
tagline: Manikandeswaram Uma Maheswara temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Manikandeswaram Uma Maheswara temple or Manikandeswaram Siva Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva and Parvati, in Vadakkekad, Thrissur district, Kerala, India.
overview.description: Manikandeswaram Uma Maheswara temple or Manikandeswaram Siva Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva and Parvati, in Vadakkekad, Thrissur district, Kerala, India. Believed to be more than two thousand years old, this is one of the oldest temples in India. It is also one of the rare temples where Shiva and Parvati reside in the same sanctum sanctorum (sreekovil) with Ganapati right outside. The concept is that of Shiva holding Parvati with his left palm while Ganapati is sitting on Parvati's lap.

topPlaces.name: Punnayur
topPlaces.description: Punnayur is a Panchayath in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.This village has coastal area, Mannalamkunnu Beach is one of tourist destination in Trissur District . The office, co-op bank and Punnayur Village are located in Edakkara.

topPlaces.name: Kochanoor
topPlaces.description: Kochanoor is a village in the Thrissur district of Kerala, South India, India. It is situated near the village of Vadakkekad.

topPlaces.name: Vadakkekad
topPlaces.description: Vadakkekad is a village located in the Thrissur district of Kerala, India. As of 2023, the village has a population of over 21,000 people.

topPlaces.name: Vylathur
topPlaces.description: Vylathur is a village in Thrissur district in Kerala state in south India, close to Guruvayoor. The commercial town of Kunnamkulam is also a few minutes drive.

topPlaces.name: Punnayurkulam
topPlaces.description: Punnyurkulam is a village and gram panchayat in Thrissur district of Kerala, the southwestern state of India.

topPlaces.name: Konathukunnu
topPlaces.description: Konathukunnu is a town in Thrissur district, Kerala, India. The town has a panchayat office, a government school, hospitals, pharmacies, a masjid, a Shiva temple, petrol stations, several supermarkets, and bakeries.

topPlaces.name: Pengamuck
topPlaces.description: Pengamuck is a village 32 kilometers from Thrissur in the state of Kerala, India. The word "pengamuck" literally means place of areca nuts, which are grown in the area.

topPlaces.name: Kattakampal
topPlaces.description: Kattakampal is a village in Thrissur in the state of Kerala, India. It is famous for Pooram which is an annual festival of Kattakampal Temple.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Manikandeswaram Uma Maheswara temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Manikandeswaram Uma Maheswara temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Manikandeswaram Uma Maheswara temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (54 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (82 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Manikandeswaram Uma Maheswara temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Manikandeswaram Uma Maheswara temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Manikandeswaram Uma Maheswara temple?
faq.a: Stays in Manikandeswaram Uma Maheswara temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Manikandeswaram Uma Maheswara temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Punnayur, Kochanoor, Vadakkekad, Vylathur, Punnayurkulam.
